trello_cards.title: Set up authentication module with token expiry handling
trello_cards.description:
Action item from voice recording — 2026-04-24.

Implement JWT-based auth with automatic token refresh when the access token expires. Make sure to handle 401 responses gracefully across all API calls.

trello_cards.title: Design the onboarding flow for new users
trello_cards.description:
Action item from voice recording — 2026-04-23.

Create a 3-step onboarding that explains the record → summarize → Trello pipeline. Include an animated walkthrough on first launch.

trello_cards.title: Write unit tests for the recording pipeline
trello_cards.description:
Action item from voice recording — 2026-04-22.

Cover STT upload, AI extraction, and Trello MCP card creation. Mock the external API calls.

trello_cards.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
trello_cards.description:
Action item from voice recording — 2026-04-21.

Automate backend tests and Flutter build on every PR. Deploy to staging on merge to main.

trello_cards.title: Add offline recording support with queued sync
trello_cards.description:
Action item from voice recording — 2026-04-20.

Allow recordings to be saved locally when offline. Automatically process and push to Trello when connection is restored.

recordings.rawText: So the main thing I wanted to note today is that we need to set up the authentication module and make sure we handle the error cases properly when the token expires. We should also look at the refresh token mechanism. It would be great to have automatic retry logic built in.
recordings.summary: Set up authentication module with token expiry handling and automatic retry logic for refresh tokens.

recordings.rawText: I was thinking about the onboarding experience, you know, for new users who open the app for the first time. We should have like a 3-step walkthrough that shows them how to record a voice memo, how the AI summarizes it, and then how it automatically goes to Trello. Maybe with some nice animations.
recordings.summary: Design a 3-step onboarding walkthrough explaining the record → summarize → Trello workflow, with animations.

recordings.rawText: Quick note — need to write tests for the recording pipeline. Cover the STT upload endpoint, the AI extraction call, and the Trello MCP integration. Mock all the external APIs so the tests are fast and reliable.
recordings.summary: Write unit tests covering STT upload, AI extraction, and Trello MCP integration with mocked external APIs.

upload_response.rawText: So the main thing I wanted to note today is that we need to set up the authentication module...

summarize_response.summary: Set up authentication module with token expiry handling and automatic retry logic for refresh tokens.
